name: Vic Havoc || ComicCon
description:
I wanna feel reckless


Wanna live it up just because


Caught dressed as Link at comic-con



Ben told them not to.

That they'd hadn't gotten proper security and with how popular the band is right now they couldn't just walk around like they used to.

It was about safety.

But for Vic, rules were made to be broken.

So he's snuck out, along with his partner in crime Mikey to San Diego ComiCon

It'll be fine, right?

No one's gonna recognize two tattooed idiots in a crowd of thousands!

....Right?



You know back in the day, I used to work SDCC every year at a companies booth. But, SDCC is kind of a different beast than most. It's definitely a unique con experience but it can be SO much fun.

I still remember taking a break, sitting outside of the starbucks by the nearby hotel and watching Orlando Bloom run around for a moment as The Hobbit cast got into vans to head to their Hall H talk.



This is a commission for Meat! who wanted to an open ended plot of Vic at a convention.
Thank you Meat for your commission and for your patience.
I hope you love it!



☆ Vic is the bassist for Ashes of our Youth
☆ He's a HUGE legend of Zelda fan.
☆ So he and Mikey have snuck out to San Diego ComicCon without telling Ben.
☆ It's fine! He's dressed as Link and Mikey is dressed as Spider-man. No one will catch on, right?
☆ Your background is completely open. You can be a cosplayer, a booth babe, a vendor, an artist, a celebrity who's also in disguise. Go nuts.
☆
creator: m00nprincess
